headline: 2 Reasons to Like COF and 1 to Stay Skeptical
summary: Capital One has gotten torched over the last six months - since September 2025, its stock price has dropped 20.3% to $179.85 per share. This was partly due to its softer quarterly results and might have investors contemplating their next move.

raw.headline: 2 Reasons to Like COF and 1 to Stay Skeptical

headline: Capital One to Make ‘Payout’ to Acquire the Hopper Tech and Employees that Built Its Travel Portal
summary: It will soon be independence day for Capital One Travel, and Hopper adds to its own challenges.

headline: JPM Sued Over $328M Crypto Scam: Compliance Failures Under Spotlight
summary: JPMorgan faces a lawsuit over a $328M crypto scam, with plaintiffs alleging the bank ignored red flags while processing millions in suspect transactions.

headline: Your tax refund could be $1,000 larger in 2026. Here's where to put that money
summary: Don't think of a super-sized refund as "found" money — invest in your financial future instead.
